items.title: Nvidia stock rose 18%+ over the past ten days, its longest winning streak since 2023; Jensen Huang said in March that Nvidia has $1T of GPU orders through 2027 (Katie Tarasov/CNBC)
items.title_original: Nvidia stock rose 18%+ over the past ten days, its longest winning streak since 2023; Jensen Huang said in March that Nvidia has $1T of GPU orders through 2027 (Katie Tarasov/CNBC)
items.title_en: Nvidia stock rose 18%+ over the past ten days, its longest winning streak since 2023; Jensen Huang said in March that Nvidia has $1T of GPU orders through 2027 (Katie Tarasov/CNBC)
items.title_zh: 英伟达股价在过去十天内上涨了 18% 以上，这是自 2023 年以来最长的连续上涨； Jensen Huang 在 3 月份表示，到 2027 年，Nvidia 的 GPU 订单将达到 1T 美元（Katie Tarasov/CNBC）
